use_cases: Displaying user profile pictures with fallback initials in chat interfaces
Showing user avatars with online/offline status indicators in dashboards
Rendering profile images with lazy-loading fallbacks in social applications
Creating user identity elements with customizable status badges
ai_summary: A composite Avatar component system built with Radix UI primitives featuring image display with fallback initials, status indicators (online, offline, busy, away), and customizable styling via CVA variants. Includes Avatar, AvatarImage, AvatarFallback, AvatarIndicator, and AvatarStatus sub-components for flexible user profile representation.
